name: WBEM / WMI Core Components
categoryDescription: Configuration and artifacts from third-party software — archive tools, cleanup utilities, development tools, and legacy applications.
description: WMI CIMOM (Common Information Model Object Manager) and WDM (Windows Driver Model provider) configuration.
forensic_value: CIMOM configuration reveals WMI infrastructure setup. Unexpected CIMOM entries may indicate WMI provider tampering. Cross-reference with WMI-Activity Operational log EID 5857 (provider started).
